mandate: J: 'there has to be something profitable if we just tweak certain parameters.' Find his optimal strike/hold/TP, validate forward on OUR data.

method.part_A_defines: His Webull winners (analysis/webull-j-trades/) DEFINE each candidate param value. B1 from moneyness-at-entry buckets; B2/B3 from option-premium path reconstructed along the cached underlier with per-trade IV inverted from his real entry fill.
method.part_B_validates: OUR 2025-26 SPY real OPRA fills (lib.simulator_real.simulate_trade_real, causal, chart-stop-only) VALIDATE each value forward on the two live edges (gap_and_go LIVE, j_vwap_continuation flip-ready). Each sweep isolates ONE knob vs the live baseline.
method.anti_overfit_rule: A value 'optimal on his data' with NO OUR-data OOS lift is DEAD (overfit), not a win.

data.his: 313 SPX-family winners (284 0DTE) with bar caches; full roundtrips for by-bucket stats
data.ours: spy_5m_2025-01-01_2026-06-16.csv, 363 trading days, real OPRA fills (cache ends ~2026-05-29)

method.scale_verified: His bar cache + entry_close are SPY-scale; SPX strikes /10 (median ratio 10.03), SPY strikes x1 (1.00). Moneyness computed on the common SPY scale.

his_data_optimal.read: His sharpest risk/reward was modest-OTM (OTM-1/OTM-2), NOT ATM, ITM, or deep-OTM lottery tickets.

our_data_validation.headline: His OTM preference does NOT transfer to OUR option edge (C29/C3 lesson). The forward-optimal strike on gap-and-go is ITM-1; OTM-1 is flat, OTM-2 is DEAD (-$29/trade OOS).

gap_and_go_at_true_live_settings.oos_lift: +$35.3/trade (+42%), +$1,655 total; all structural gates PASS; WR -2pp (deeper-delta tradeoff: higher delta / less theta = bigger $-capture on the gap continuation).

j_vwap_continuation.itm1_verdict: WATCH (+$11/trade OOS, but baseline fails all-cuts-OOS+ so no candidate can SHIP); OTM1/OTM2 DEAD

combined_strike_x_tp_grid_gap_and_go_oos.note: ITM-1 dominates ATM/OTM-1 at EVERY TP level — robust, not an artifact.

exact_param_change.change: DEFAULT_STRIKE_OFFSET: int = 0  ->  -1   (line ~76; also the 'strike_offset' in the go-live params dict ~line 261)
exact_param_change.effect: gap-and-go enters ITM-1 (strike $1 in-the-money) instead of ATM.
exact_param_change.guard: Ships under OP-22 (ship-validated-wins): OOS+ AND WF>=0.70 AND all-cuts-OOS+ AND DSR-PASS AND both-dirs+ AND drop-top5-robust — all PASS. gap_and_go_enabled is still false in params.json (detector inert until J flips live); this change tunes the strike the detector WILL use. OP-21 live-gate (3 live J confirmations) still stands. J holds REVOKE.
exact_param_change.scope_note: Account-tier strikes (Safe OTM-2 / Bold ITM-2 in v15_strike_offset_per_tier) govern the general signal-driven book; THIS is a per-setup override for gap-and-go specifically (analogous to its per-setup chart-stop-only override). Bold's ITM-2 tier is already deeper than ITM-1, consistent with the direction of this finding.

his_data_optimal.value: peak hold-ceiling band ~30-60 min from entry
his_data_optimal.read: Half his winners peaked within 30 min; he typically EXITED even earlier (median 14 min). Suggests cutting the long tail might help.

our_data_validation.headline: No early time-stop produced a robust OOS lift over the live 15:40 on either detector. The few SHIP-tagged cells (gap-and-go 11:00 +$3.9, 13:00 +$0.4) have NEGLIGIBLE lift and no monotone structure; mid-day stops (11:30/12:00) were DEAD (cut winners). On j_vwap_continuation early stops were WATCH-only (baseline already fails all-cuts-OOS+).
our_data_validation.interpretation: His-data 'peak ~30 min' describes WINNERS; on OUR full tape (winners+losers) an early hard time-stop clips the runners that pay for losers. The v15 chandelier trailing-stop already captures the 'lock in before the fade' behavior dynamically and better than a static clock. C28: exit tuning has diminishing returns once the dynamic trail is in place.

B2_hold_time.exact_param_change: NONE — keep time_stop_et = 15:40 (live). Early time-stop is overfit to his winner-peak distribution; no forward edge.

B3_tp_target.subtag: CONFIRMS-CURRENT (live tp1_pct=0.50 is already OOS-optimal; his low-TP is DEAD)

his_data_optimal.value: low TP — his winners' median peak gain was only ~15%
his_data_optimal.read: Most of his winners peaked at a MODEST premium gain; a low TP1 (~15%) would bank more of his winners before the fade.

our_data_validation.headline: His low-TP optimum is DEAD/INVERTED forward. On OUR full tape a LOW TP1 (0.10/0.20) HURT OOS expectancy (-$20 to -$25 on gap-and-go); the OOS-optimal among {0.10,0.15,0.20,0.30,0.50} is tp1_pct=0.50 — which is ALREADY the live Safe value.
our_data_validation.critical_correction: The Part-B sweep baseline used tp1_pct=0.30 (the simulator DEFAULT), but the LIVE value is already 0.50 (Safe params.json) / 0.75 (Bold). So the '+$24.7 lift' is vs a non-live default; against reality there is NO change to ship — the sweep independently RE-CONFIRMS the current 0.50 setting is optimal. (L110-class: always verify a sweep baseline against prod values.)
our_data_validation.reconciliation: His ~15% describes where HIS winners PEAKED (a winner-only statistic). On OUR tape (winners+losers) banking half at +15% caps the winners that must offset the losers -> a higher TP1 wins forward. Different questions; not a contradiction. His-data-derived value (low TP) = DEAD; the live high TP stands.

B3_tp_target.exact_param_change: NONE — keep tp1_premium_pct = 0.50 (Safe, already live & re-validated optimal) / 0.75 (Bold, above sweep grid; not contradicted). His low-TP candidate is rejected as overfit.

SHIP: B1 strike: gap-and-go ATM -> ITM-1 (DEFAULT_STRIKE_OFFSET 0 -> -1), +$35/trade (+42%) OOS, all gates PASS
WATCH: B3 TP: live tp1_pct=0.50 RE-CONFIRMED OOS-optimal (no change); his low-TP rejected. j_vwap_continuation ITM-1 +$11 OOS (blocked only by baseline all-cuts-OOS gate)
DEAD: B2 hold: no early time-stop beats live 15:40 robustly (his winner-peak band doesn't transfer; v15 chandelier already captures it)
B1/B3 his OTM-strike & low-TP preferences: do NOT transfer to OUR option edge (C29/C3)
summary.headline: ONE ship-grade tweak found: gap-and-go strike ATM->ITM-1 (+42% OOS expectancy, all robustness gates pass). His other two param preferences (strike-OTM, TP-low) are overfit to his SPX-winner distribution and DIE forward — exactly what the anti-overfit method is for. The TP sweep also caught a baseline-vs-live discrepancy and RE-CONFIRMED the current live 0.50.

caveats: Proxy strikes (L58): nearest-cached real-OPRA strike used; ITM-1 had n=85 vs ATM n=84 (one extra cache hit) — immaterial, both >80.

B2/B3 his-data peak path uses IV inverted from his own entry fill (no 2021-23 VIX); self-calibrating per trade and more honest than a flat VIX proxy, but it holds IV constant intrabar (ignores vol-of-vol on the path).

j_vwap_continuation baseline fails strict all-cuts-OOS+ (most-recent OOS window, partial OPRA coverage) — same WATCH_ONLY class as the shipped H4; no candidate there can reach SHIP regardless of knob.
Propose-only (Rule 9). gap_and_go_enabled=false in params.json — the ITM-1 change tunes the dormant detector; flip + 3 live J confirmations (OP-21) before any live order. J holds REVOKE.
